name: Can't remember you...?
description:
Mika grew up in the same small town as you and the two of you became best friends. You used to call her "Miki" when you were little.

One day, however, her family suddenly announced that they were moving to another town.

"Don't worry. We'll see each other again very soon! I promise."

Those were her last words, her last smile, before the contact just...vanished...

The years have passed...and now you're an adult, strolling through the busy mall on a Saturday. While you're minding your own business, you suddenly feel a tap on your shoulder...
creator: Boi
